entities.vendor: a vendor gesturing at his produce

scenes.title: The Market Haggle
scenes.background_prompt: An outdoor market with a produce stall, crates of vegetables, a hanging scale, and a canvas awning. Morning light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: An outdoor market on a bright morning. A vendor — a stout man in a rolled-up white shirt and a flat cap — stands behind a wooden produce stall piled with tomatoes, peppers, and eggplants. He holds up three fingers with one hand and gestures broadly at his tomatoes with the other, mouth open mid-pitch, eyebrows raised persuasively. Across the stall, a woman in a green headscarf and a long cardigan shakes her head firmly, one hand raised palm-out in a 'no' gesture, the other hand holding a canvas shopping bag already half full. Their exchange is animated but friendly — a classic haggle. A hanging brass scale dangles from the stall's wooden frame. A canvas awning in tan provides shade. Other stalls with fruits and spices stretch behind them in a colorful row.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place vendor behind the wooden stall, standing and holding up three fingers with one hand, gesturing at tomatoes with the other, mouth open mid-pitch. Place customer across the stall, standing and shaking her head, one hand raised palm-out in a 'no' gesture, other hand holding a canvas shopping bag.
